## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement you want.

## Problem

What user or developer problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior, workflow, or API you want.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternatives, workarounds, or tradeoffs you have considered.

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, mockups, sample Markdown, or related references if helpful.
